channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Party's Future at Stake in Tuesday Primaries
item.description: A battle over the Democratic Party's direction is being decided in at least six primaries across the country, testing the influence of different factions.

item.title: Anthropic faces backlash over AI spending ahead of IPO
item.description: Anthropic filed for an IPO as corporate America enters a phase of AI cost concerns. Companies are Anthropic's main...

item.title: America's manufacturing recovery remains uneven
item.description: Data from the Institute for Supply Management via FactSet; Chart by Courtenay Brown/Axios. This chart is what White House economic officials want to highlight...

item.title: Exclusive: Office workers increasingly use OpenAI's Codex
item.description: Knowledge workers now account for about one-fifth of OpenAI's Codex users and are growing more than three times faster than developers, according to a new...
